issues_found: Source is a press release announcing research, not the actual research papers themselves (thin, low-signal source)
Only one of two articles mentioned has tangential market structure relevance; the school finance article is entirely outside scope
Source age (January 2017) is nearly 9.5 years old with no clear current market structure application
Research findings about <1bp auction cost have limited archival value for current market operations
market_structure_context acknowledges 'historical academic research from 2017 with no direct implications for current market operations'
